title: ‘I still don’t think it’s enough to entice loyal YouTube viewers’: Spotify is trying to prove it’s better than YouTube by launching its first music video charts — bringing the MTV music channel format into the streaming era
summary: For the first time, Spotify is bringing music videos to its Charts hub with the launch of Music Video Charts Global, a new top 50 playlist of the most streamed videos.
